title: Global Health Teams Respond to Hantavirus Outbreak on Cruise Ship
subtitle: International cooperation is underway as passengers from the MV Hondius return home to quarantine following a rare viral outbreak.

summary.en: A rare hantavirus outbreak has affected passengers and crew on the cruise ship MV Hondius. Eleven cases have been reported, including three deaths, leading to a complex international evacuation effort. Health authorities in multiple countries are monitoring those who were on board to prevent the virus from spreading. Experts state that the risk to the general public remains very low. Investigation into the origin of the virus, potentially linked to a trip in South America, is currently ongoing.
summary.zh: 罕見的漢他病毒疫情影響了「宏迪斯號」郵輪上的乘客與船員。目前已通報十一例病例，包括三起死亡案例，引發了一場複雜的國際撤離行動。多國衛生當局正監控船上人員，以防止病毒擴散。專家表示，對一般大眾的風險仍然極低。針對病毒源頭的調查目前仍在進行中，該病毒可能與南美洲的一趟旅程有關。

paragraphs.en: A serious health situation has emerged following a hantavirus outbreak on the cruise ship MV Hondius. Hantavirus is a rare but dangerous virus often carried by rodents. This is the first time such an outbreak has been reported on a cruise ship, leading to a major international effort to bring passengers home safely and prevent the disease from spreading further.
paragraphs.zh: 在漢他病毒（Hantavirus）於「宏迪斯號」（MV Hondius）郵輪爆發後，出現了嚴峻的健康危機。漢他病毒是一種罕見但危險的病毒，通常由齧齒類動物攜帶。這是首次有郵輪傳出此類疫情，引發了一場重大的國際行動，旨在將乘客安全送回家園，並防止疾病進一步擴散。

paragraphs.en: According to BBC Health, the ship recently stopped at Granadilla port in Tenerife, where all passengers and crew were evacuated. So far, 11 cases have been linked to the ship, with nine confirmed and two suspected. Sadly, three people have died, including a Dutch couple who health officials believe were the first to catch the virus while traveling in South America. NPR Health reports that the couple may have been exposed to rodents while visiting a garbage dump during a bird-watching tour in Argentina.
paragraphs.zh: 根據英國廣播公司健康頻道（BBC Health）報導，該船近期停靠在特內里費島（Tenerife）的格拉納迪亞港（Granadilla port），船上所有乘客與船員皆已撤離。目前已有十一例與該船相關的病例，其中九例確診，兩例疑似。令人遺憾的是，已有三人死亡，其中包括一對荷蘭夫婦，衛生官員認為他們是在南美洲旅遊時首批感染病毒的患者。美國公共廣播電台健康頻道（NPR Health）報導指出，這對夫婦可能是在阿根廷參加賞鳥行程時，造訪垃圾掩埋場而接觸到齧齒類動物。

paragraphs.en: As the ship returns to the Netherlands for cleaning, health agencies around the world are working to manage the risk. In the United Kingdom, passengers were taken to Arrowe Park Hospital in Merseyside for medical checks. The Guardian Health notes that many of these individuals have now tested negative and are moving to home isolation. They will remain in quarantine for 45 days to ensure they do not develop symptoms. The UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) has praised the passengers for their cooperation during this difficult time.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著郵輪返回荷蘭進行清潔，全球各地的衛生機構正致力於控管風險。在英國，乘客被送往默西賽德郡（Merseyside）的阿羅公園醫院（Arrowe Park Hospital）進行醫療檢查。《衛報》（The Guardian）健康版指出，許多乘客目前的檢測結果呈陰性，並已轉為居家隔離。他們將接受四十五天的隔離，以確保不會出現症狀。英國衛生安全局（UKHSA）稱讚乘客在這段艱難時期展現的配合態度。

paragraphs.en: In the United States, the response has been equally careful. STAT News reports that the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) is actively monitoring American passengers. Some are being cared for at specialized medical centers in Nebraska and Atlanta, while others are isolating at home. CDC officials emphasize that their teams are following a strict plan to keep the public safe. They have stated clearly that the risk to the general public remains very low, as the virus has only been found among those who were on the ship.
paragraphs.zh: 在美國，相關應對措施同樣謹慎。STAT新聞網（STAT News）報導，美國疾病管制與預防中心（CDC）正積極監控美國籍乘客。部分乘客在內布拉斯加州與亞特蘭大的專業醫療中心接受照護，其他人則在居家隔離。疾管中心官員強調，其團隊正遵循嚴格的計畫以維護大眾安全。他們明確表示，由於病毒僅在船上人員中發現，對一般大眾造成的風險仍然極低。

paragraphs.en: Medical experts are treating the situation with great seriousness. NPR Health reports that one French passenger is currently in critical condition at a hospital in Paris. Doctors are using a special machine to act as an artificial lung, helping the patient breathe while their body fights the infection. Because there is no specific cure or vaccine for hantavirus, doctors focus on supportive care to help the body recover.
paragraphs.zh: 醫學專家正以極度嚴肅的態度處理此情況。美國公共廣播電台健康頻道報導，一名法國乘客目前在巴黎的醫院情況危急。醫師正使用特殊機器作為人工肺，協助患者呼吸，同時讓身體對抗感染。由於目前沒有針對漢他病毒的特效藥或疫苗，醫師主要採取支持性療法，協助患者身體恢復。

paragraphs.en: International cooperation is a key part of the response. BBC Health explains that countries are using similar methods to manage returning citizens. This includes medical checks by trained professionals and long periods of self-isolation. Because the virus has a long incubation period—the time between catching the virus and showing symptoms—authorities are being extra cautious. Passengers are required to monitor their temperature daily and report any changes in their health.
paragraphs.zh: 國際合作是此次應對行動的關鍵。英國廣播公司健康頻道說明，各國正採用相似的方法來管理返國公民，包括由受過訓練的專業人員進行醫療檢查，以及長期的自我隔離。由於該病毒具有較長的潛伏期（即感染病毒到出現症狀之間的時間），當局正採取額外謹慎的措施。乘客被要求每日監測體溫，並回報任何健康狀況的變化。

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, the search for answers continues. Argentina is sending a team of scientific experts to investigate the locations the Dutch couple visited before boarding the cruise. While some local officials have questioned the theory that the outbreak started at a specific landfill, the investigation aims to confirm exactly where the virus originated. This information is vital to prevent similar incidents in the future.
paragraphs.zh: 與此同時，尋找答案的工作仍在持續。阿根廷正派遣一組科學專家團隊，調查該對荷蘭夫婦在登船前造訪的地點。儘管部分地方官員對疫情始於特定垃圾掩埋場的說法存疑，但調查旨在確認病毒的確切源頭。這些資訊對於預防未來發生類似事件至關重要。

paragraphs.en: Despite the concerns, health officials remain calm. The CDC told STAT News that their systems and partnerships are built for exactly this kind of emergency. By working together across borders, these agencies hope to contain the virus effectively. For now, the focus remains on the safety of the passengers and crew, ensuring they receive the care they need while protecting the rest of the world from further spread.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管各界感到擔憂，衛生官員仍保持冷靜。美國疾病管制與預防中心向STAT新聞網表示，他們的系統與合作夥伴關係正是為了應對此類緊急狀況而建立。透過跨國界的共同努力，這些機構希望能有效遏止病毒。目前，重點仍放在乘客與船員的安全上，確保他們獲得所需的照護，同時保護世界其他地區免受進一步擴散的威脅。

keyTerms.definitionEn: Connected to or associated with something as a cause or result.
keyTerms.noteZh: 此處表示病例與該船隻的關聯，而非實體連接。文中：So far, 11 cases have been linked to the ship, with nine confirmed and two suspected.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To be in a situation where you are in contact with something harmful.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 接觸到（有害物質或環境）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常誤以為是「暴露」，在此指接觸到病毒源頭。文中：NPR Health reports that the couple may have been exposed to rodents while visiting a garbage dump during a bird-watching tour in Argentina.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To perform the function or role of something else.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這裡指機器代替肺部功能，而非表演。文中：Doctors are using a special machine to act as an artificial lung, helping the patient breathe while their body fights the infection.

sources.title: Hantavirus risk remains low, CDC says, citing its ‘playbook’ response

quiz.question: What is the specific requirement for passengers who have tested negative and moved to home isolation in the UK?

options.A: They must remain in the hospital for 45 days.
options.B: They must stay in quarantine for 45 days to monitor for symptoms.
options.C: They must report to the Arrowe Park Hospital every day for a check-up.
options.D: They must travel back to the Netherlands for a final medical examination.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。文章第三段明確指出，許多檢測結果為陰性的乘客已轉移至居家隔離，並需維持 45 天的隔離期以確保不會出現症狀。選項 A 錯誤，因為他們是居家隔離而非住院。選項 C 錯誤，文中並未要求每日返回醫院。選項 D 錯誤，文中提到船隻才要返回荷蘭進行清潔，而非乘客。

quiz.question: Based on the information provided, why do health authorities insist on such long isolation periods for the passengers?

options.A: Because the virus is highly contagious through casual social contact.
options.B: Because there is a high risk of the virus mutating while on the ship.
options.C: Because the virus has a long incubation period, meaning symptoms may appear much later.
options.D: Because they are waiting for a specific vaccine to be developed and distributed.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據第六段，當局採取額外謹慎的態度是因為漢他病毒有很長的潛伏期（incubation period），即感染後到出現症狀之間的時間較長。選項 A 與文章強調病毒僅在船上人員中發現且風險低不符。選項 B 文中未提及變異。選項 D 錯誤，文中提到目前尚無特定疫苗，隔離是為了監控健康而非等待疫苗。

quiz.question: In the fifth paragraph, what does the word 'supportive' mean in the phrase 'supportive care'?

options.A: Providing emotional encouragement to the patient.
options.B: Treating the symptoms to help the body recover on its own.
options.C: Using experimental drugs to cure the infection directly.
options.D: Relying on the hospital staff to perform all physical tasks for the patient.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。在醫學語境中，「supportive care」（支持性療法）是指針對症狀進行治療，協助身體機能維持穩定，讓患者自身的免疫系統有機會對抗感染，而非直接殺死病毒的特效藥。選項 A 雖然支持性有情感支持之意，但在醫學語境下不準確。選項 C 錯誤，因為文中明確提到尚無特定治療藥物。選項 D 過於狹隘，未涵蓋醫療上的生理支持。

quiz.question: What is the primary focus of the international health response to the MV Hondius outbreak?

options.A: Investigating the specific garbage dump in Argentina where the virus originated.
options.B: Criticizing the cruise ship company for failing to maintain sanitary conditions.
options.C: Developing a new vaccine to protect future travelers from hantavirus.
options.D: Managing the health of passengers and containing the virus to prevent further spread.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。文章整體主旨圍繞在國際衛生機構如何合作，透過隔離、監控與醫療照顧，確保乘客安全並防止病毒擴散。選項 A 僅是調查的一部分，非整體目標。選項 B 文中並未對船公司進行譴責。選項 C 錯誤，文中提到的是目前無疫苗，且重點在於現有的防疫管理而非研發新藥。
